narrative:
Scioto Twp township has 6,315 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.5 percentage points.
